name: Plenty Filling Chamber Reducer
summary: The Plenty Filling Chamber Reducer for the Plenty Vaporiser is specifically designed for vaporising small quantities of diced herbs.
description: The Plenty Filling Chamber Reducer for the Plenty Vaporiser is specifically designed for vaporising small quantities of diced herbs. It is also compatible with dosing capsules for easy use. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
